testsuite.name: test.AccountCreationTesting

testcase.name: createAccount
testcase.system-out: Mobile Error: Please enter a valid mobile number or email address. Password Error: Enter a combination of at least six numbers, letters and punctuation marks (such as ! and &).

testsuite.system-out: Mobile Error: Please enter a valid mobile number or email address. Password Error: Enter a combination of at least six numbers, letters and punctuation marks (such as ! and &).
